song.title: Only Grace
song.author: Matthew West
song.presentation: V1 C V2 C B C
song.lyrics:
[V1] . G Em There is no guilt here, there is no shame . D C No pointing fingers, |there is no blame . Em D What happened yesterday |has disappeared . Am C The dirt has washed away |and now it’s clear.
[C] . G D There's only grace, |there’s only love . C There's only mercy |and believe me it's enough . Em D Your sins are gone, |without a trace . Am C There's nothing left now, there’s only grace.
[V2] . G Em You're starting over now, under the sun . D You're stepping forward now . C A new life has begun, your new life has begun.
[B] . Em-Am-Em And if you should fall again . D Get back up, get back up . Em-Am-Em Reach out and take my hand . D Get back up, get back up . C Get back up again,| just get back up again
